about.title: About Just Cases
about.subtitle: We are passionate about providing premium mobile accessories that enhance your device experience while reflecting your personal style.
about.mission.text1: At Just Cases, we believe your mobile device is an extension of your personality. Our mission is to provide high-quality, stylish accessories that not only protect your devices but also express your unique style.
about.mission.text2: We carefully curate our collection to ensure every product meets our standards for quality, durability, and design excellence.
about.premiumQuality.text: Every product in our collection is chosen for its high quality and innovative design.
about.value.customerFirst.text: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. We listen, learn, and continuously improve based on your feedback.
about.value.qualityFocus.text: We never compromise on quality. Every product is tested and verified to meet our high standards.
about.value.innovation.text: We stay ahead of trends and technologies to bring you the latest and most innovative accessories.
about.value.sustainability.text: We are committed to environmental protection and sustainable business practices.
about.whyChooseUs.text: With years of experience in the mobile accessories industry, we have built a reputation for delivering exceptional products and services. Our passion for quality and innovation makes us the preferred choice for customers worldwide.

features.title: Just Cases Features
features.subtitle: Discover why our premium mobile accessories are the choice of thousands of customers worldwide.
features.core.protectionDesc: Our cases provide military-grade protection, withstanding drops from up to 3 meters. We use special shock-absorbing materials.
features.core.chargingDesc: Fast charging technology with up to 65W power. Charge your device to 50% in just 30 minutes.
features.core.compatibilityDesc: Compatible with over 500 phone models from all leading brands. MagSafe compatible for iPhone.
features.core.soundDesc: Our wireless earphones offer crystal-clear sound with active noise cancellation and up to 30 hours of battery life.
features.core.batteryDesc: Power banks with up to 20,000 mAh capacity provide multiple charges for your device.
features.core.wirelessDesc: Bluetooth 5.3 and Qi wireless charging for maximum convenience without cables.
features.tech.magsafeDesc: Powerful magnets for perfect alignment with your iPhone. Compatible with all MagSafe accessories.
features.tech.activeDefDesc: Technology that activates on impact and distributes force for maximum device protection.
features.tech.ecoDesc: We use recycled and sustainable materials. Our packaging is 100% recyclable.
features.quality.ceDesc: All products meet European safety and quality standards.
features.quality.fccDesc: Approved by the Federal Communications Commission for safe use.
features.quality.ip68Desc: Water and dust resistance to IP68 standard.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s1.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.s1.text: Welcome to Just Cases. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.
privacy.s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
privacy.s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
privacy.s4.title: 4. Sharing Information
privacy.s4.text: We do not sell your personal information. We share information only with:
privacy.s5.title: 5. Data Protection
privacy.s5.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data:
privacy.s6.title: 6. Cookies
privacy.s7.title: 7. Your Rights
privacy.s8.title: 8. Data Retention
privacy.s8.text: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, or to comply with legal requirements.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Children's Privacy
privacy.s9.text: Our service is not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.s10.title: 10. Policy Changes
privacy.s10.text: We reserve the right to update this policy. We will notify you of significant changes via email or website notification.
privacy.s11.title: 11. Contact

terms.s1.text: Welcome to Just Cases. By using our website, you agree to these terms of use.

terms.s2.item4: "Product" refers to goods offered in the store

support.title: Customer Support
support.subtitle: We are here to help! Find answers to your questions or contact our team.
support.emailDesc: Send us an email and we will respond within 24 hours
support.urgentNote: For urgent questions outside working hours, please send an email and we will respond as soon as possible.
support.quickSupportDesc: Our team strives to answer all questions within 24 hours.
support.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
support.faq.q1: How can I place an order?
support.faq.a1: Simply browse our catalog, add products to cart, and follow the checkout steps. You can pay with card, PayPal, or cash on delivery.
support.faq.a2: You can change or cancel your order while it hasn't been shipped. Contact us as soon as possible.
support.faq.q3: How do I know if a product is in stock?
support.faq.a3: Availability is shown on each product page. If a product is out of stock, you can subscribe for a notification.
support.faq.a4: Standard delivery is 3-5 business days, express is 1-2 business days, and same-day delivery is available in Sofia.
support.faq.a5: Yes, after shipping you'll receive an email with a tracking number and link to the courier service.
support.faq.a6: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. Costs and timelines vary by location.
support.faq.q7: How do I return a product?
support.faq.a7: You have 30 days to return. The product must be in original packaging. Contact us for details.
support.faq.q8: When will I get my refund?
support.faq.a8: Refunds typically take 5-10 business days after receiving the returned product.
support.faq.a9: Yes, we offer free exchanges within 30 days if the product is in good condition.

support.form.success: ✓ Message sent successfully! We will reply soon.
support.form.error: Error sending message. Please try again.

ordersFaq.title: Orders - Frequently Asked Questions
ordersFaq.subtitle: Learn everything about placing orders, tracking them, and managing your purchase history.
ordersFaq.statuses.title: Order Statuses
ordersFaq.status.pendingDesc: Your order has been received and is awaiting processing.
ordersFaq.status.processingDesc: The order is being prepared for shipping.
ordersFaq.status.shippedDesc: The order has been handed to the courier.
ordersFaq.status.deliveredDesc: The order has been delivered successfully.
ordersFaq.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
ordersFaq.faq.q1: How do I place an order?
ordersFaq.faq.a1: Select products, add them to cart, and follow the checkout steps.
ordersFaq.faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
ordersFaq.faq.a2: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, and Apple Pay.
ordersFaq.faq.a3: Yes, we send an email confirmation with order details immediately.
ordersFaq.faq.q4: Can I order without an account?
ordersFaq.faq.a4: Currently, registration is required for order tracking and management.
ordersFaq.faq.q5: How do I track my order?
ordersFaq.faq.a5: Log into your account and go to the "My Orders" section for current status.
ordersFaq.faq.q7: What do the different statuses mean?
ordersFaq.faq.a7: Pending → Processing → Shipped → Delivered. Each status shows which stage the order is at.
ordersFaq.faq.q8: When will I get tracking information?
ordersFaq.faq.a8: You'll receive an email with a tracking number as soon as the order is shipped.
ordersFaq.faq.a9: You can cancel as long as the order hasn't been shipped. Contact us.
ordersFaq.faq.q10: When will I get my money back?
ordersFaq.faq.a10: Upon cancellation, refunds take 5-10 business days via the original payment method.
ordersFaq.faq.a11: Contact us and we'll do our best to cancel individual products.
ordersFaq.faq.a12: No, cancellation is free if the order hasn't been shipped.
ordersFaq.faq.q13: How do I view my past orders?
ordersFaq.faq.a13: Log into your account and go to the "My Orders" section.
ordersFaq.faq.a14: You can add products from a previous order directly to your cart.
ordersFaq.faq.a15: Order history is kept indefinitely in your account.
ordersFaq.faq.a16: You can download an invoice from the details of each order.

deliveries.title: Manage Deliveries
deliveries.subtitle: Learn how to manage your addresses, track orders, and resolve delivery issues.
deliveries.trackingDesc: Track the status of all your orders in real time
deliveries.addressesDesc: Manage multiple shipping and billing addresses
deliveries.notificationsDesc: Receive SMS and email notifications about delivery status
deliveries.historyDesc: View the history of all your deliveries and orders
deliveries.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
deliveries.trackOrderDesc: Log into your account to see the status of all orders
deliveries.addAddressDesc: You can add a delivery address directly when ordering
deliveries.standard.title: Standard Delivery
deliveries.express.title: Express Delivery
deliveries.sameDay.title: Same Day Delivery
deliveries.faq.tracking.q1: How can I track my order?
deliveries.faq.tracking.a1: After your order is shipped, you will receive an email with a tracking number. You can use this number in the 'My Orders' section or directly on the courier company's website.
deliveries.faq.tracking.a2: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days, express 1-2 business days, and same-day delivery is available only for Sofia. Timeframes start from the day of shipping.
deliveries.faq.tracking.q3: Do I receive notifications about delivery status?
deliveries.faq.tracking.a3: Yes, you receive SMS and email notifications for every change in order status - on shipping, on handover to courier, and on delivery.
deliveries.faq.tracking.q4: Can I change the delivery address after shipping?
deliveries.faq.tracking.a4: You can change the address only if the package has not been shipped yet. Contact us immediately at support@justcases.bg for help.
deliveries.faq.addresses.q1: How do I add a new delivery address?
deliveries.faq.addresses.a1: In the 'My Addresses' section of your account, click 'Add New Address'. Enter the full address, including postal code and contact phone number.
deliveries.faq.addresses.q2: How many addresses can I have?
deliveries.faq.addresses.a2: You can have up to 10 different delivery addresses. This allows you to choose the most convenient address for each order.
deliveries.faq.addresses.a3: Yes, you can edit or delete saved addresses in the 'My Addresses' section. Changes are saved immediately.
deliveries.faq.addresses.q4: How do I set a default address?
deliveries.faq.addresses.a4: In the address list, you can mark one as 'Default Address'. This address will be automatically selected for new orders.
deliveries.faq.issues.q1: What should I do if I don't receive my package on time?
deliveries.faq.issues.a1: First, check the package status with the tracking number. If there is a delay, contact us at support@justcases.bg with the order number.
deliveries.faq.issues.q2: What should I do if the package is damaged?
deliveries.faq.issues.a2: Immediately photograph the package and contents and contact us. We will send you a new package at no additional cost.
deliveries.faq.issues.a3: You can refuse delivery if you contact us before the package is shipped. After shipping, the package will be returned automatically.
deliveries.faq.issues.q4: What should I do if I'm not home during delivery?
deliveries.faq.issues.a4: The courier will leave a note with instructions. You can contact the courier company for redirection or redelivery.
deliveries.faq.international.a1: Currently we only deliver within Bulgaria. We are working on expanding delivery services to other countries.
deliveries.faq.international.q2: Are there plans for international delivery?
deliveries.faq.international.a2: Yes, we plan to start deliveries to neighboring countries in 2025. Follow our news for updates.
deliveries.faq.international.q3: Can I order for a friend in Bulgaria?
deliveries.faq.international.a3: Yes, you can order to any address in Bulgaria. Simply enter the recipient's address when ordering.
payments.title: Payments - FAQ
payments.subtitle: Learn everything about our payment methods, security, and refund policy.
payments.security.sslDesc: All data is transmitted through a secure connection with 256-bit encryption
payments.security.pciDesc: Stripe is certified for the highest payment security standard
payments.security.monitoringDesc: Continuous monitoring for suspicious activity and fraud
payments.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
payments.faq.methods.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
payments.faq.methods.a1: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, Apple Pay and Google Pay. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
payments.faq.methods.a2: Yes, all payments are processed through Stripe, a global leader in online payments. We do not store your card data.
payments.faq.methods.q3: Can I pay with a debit card?
payments.faq.methods.a3: Yes, you can use debit cards that support online payments. The card must have the Visa or Mastercard logo.
payments.faq.methods.q4: Does Apple Pay and Google Pay work?
payments.faq.methods.a4: Yes, both methods are available for mobile devices. They are faster and more secure than traditional card payments.
payments.faq.security.q1: How do you protect payment data?
payments.faq.security.a1: We use SSL encryption and Stripe for payment processing. We do not store card numbers or CVV codes on our servers.
payments.faq.security.a2: Stripe is a global leader in online payments, used by millions of companies. It is PCI DSS Level 1 certified - the highest security standard.
payments.faq.security.q3: Can I trust Stripe with my data?
payments.faq.security.a3: Yes, Stripe is used by companies like Amazon, Google and Microsoft. It is certified and regularly audited for security.
payments.faq.security.q4: What happens to my data after payment?
payments.faq.security.a4: After payment, Stripe only sends us a confirmation of the successful payment. All sensitive data remains in Stripe's secure environment.
payments.faq.issues.q1: What should I do if the payment fails?
payments.faq.issues.a1: Check if the card has sufficient funds, if the details are entered correctly, and if the card supports online payments. Try a different payment method.
payments.faq.issues.a2: This may be due to insufficient funds, bank restrictions, or card issues. Contact your bank or try a different card.
payments.faq.issues.a3: If you accidentally paid twice, contact us immediately at support@justcases.bg. We will refund the duplicate payment within 5-7 business days.
payments.faq.issues.a4: We currently do not offer installment payments. All payments are required in full at the time of order.
payments.faq.refunds.q1: How do I get a refund?
payments.faq.refunds.a1: To get a refund, first return the product according to our return policy. After receiving the returned product, the money is refunded automatically.
payments.faq.refunds.q2: How long does a refund take?
payments.faq.refunds.a2: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after receiving the returned product. For credit cards, it may take up to 10 business days.
payments.faq.refunds.a3: Money is refunded via the same payment method - if you paid by card, the money goes back to the same card. For PayPal payments, the refund goes to your PayPal account.
payments.faq.refunds.a4: There are no return fees on our end. If your bank charges processing fees for refunds, those are at your expense.

homePage.heroDesc: Premium cases designed for those who don't compromise. Unique design meets military protection.
homePage.feature.protectionDesc: Every case is tested to withstand drops from 3 meters. MIL-STD-810G standard for maximum device protection.
homePage.feature.materialsDesc: We use only the highest quality materials - from aviation aluminum to German polycarbonate, for lasting durability.
homePage.feature.deliveryDesc: Fast and free delivery for orders over 50 euros. Express option with delivery in 1-2 business days.
homePage.feature.returnsDesc: Not satisfied? Return the product within 30 days for a full refund, no questions asked.
homePage.feature.guaranteeDesc: All products come with a 2-year warranty. We replace any defective product for free.
homePage.review1.name: Maria Petrova
homePage.review1.text: The case is amazing! It fits perfectly and looks great. I recommend it to everyone!
homePage.review2.name: Georgi Dimitrov
homePage.review2.text: Fast charging without issues. Quality is top-notch and definitely worth the price.
homePage.review3.name: Elena Ivanova
homePage.review3.text: Already my third order from Just Cases. Always satisfied, the service is perfect!
homePage.cta.desc: Over 2000 models for all popular devices. Free delivery and 30-day return guarantee.
productCard.premiumAlt: Premium mobile accessory from Just Cases
about.value.passion.text: We are passionate about mobile accessories and strive to provide the best to our customers.
about.story.p1: Just Cases started as a small store in Sofia in 2019, with the mission to provide high-quality mobile accessories at affordable prices.
about.story.p2: Over the years, we grew from a small local store to one of the leading online stores for mobile accessories in Bulgaria.
about.story.p3: Today we serve thousands of happy customers worldwide, offering carefully curated products that combine style, quality, and functionality.
about.stat.products.label: Products
about.stat.customers.label: Happy Customers
